---
title: "Alumni"
description: "Former members of the Caravagna Lab"
---

::: {.page-intro}
<p class="eyebrow">Team · Alumni</p>

# Part of the lab's continuing story.

Former members, their work in the laboratory and where their paths led next.
:::

::: {.content-note}
**Editorial status:** names, roles, periods and current affiliations require confirmation.
:::

## Former members

The final list will be chronological, concise and easy to maintain.
